art.summary: March 22, 2026: Art market shows cautious optimism following a 4% growth in 2025. Attention is on the ongoing Outsider Art Fair in New York and smaller premier auctions concluding today. Collectors continue to favor established, quality, and high-provenance works over contemporary speculative pieces.
art.notable: U.S. art market leads with 44% share; buyers are risk-averse, pivoting toward Impressionist/Modern works; Outsider Art Fair highlights include record interest in Sam Doyle.

market.summary: Equities experienced a broad downturn for the week, with S&P 500 down 1.4%. Escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and energy price disruptions are fueling volatility. Investors are favoring defensive cash positions amidst uncertainty.

stats.S&P500: Closing lower for the 4th consecutive week
stats.Outlook: Volatile, risk-off sentiment; geopolitical impact on oil prices is the primary driver.
